problem.passage:
3. Read Mr. Park’s comments in <A> and examine the results
of a textbook evaluation by a review committee in <B>. Then
follow the directions.【3 points】
<A>
Mr. Park: The goal of my class is to help students use the
language to communicate and perform authentic tasks.
So I want to spend most of my class time letting
students rehearse tasks they need to perform outside
the classroom. I also want my students to have a lot
of opportunities to work together so that they can use
their linguistic knowledge to convey meaning rather
than just practice form.
<B>
Textbook A Textbook B Textbook C
Evaluation Criteria
1 2 3 1 2 3 1 2 3
✓ ✓ ✓ pattern drill activities
role-play based on
✓ ✓ ✓
real-life situations
✓ ✓ ✓ pronunciation tips
✓ ✓ ✓ regular grammar review
✓ ✓ ✓ group projects
*1=poor, 2=average, 3=good
Considering the information in <A> and <B>, identify the
textbook you would recommend for Mr. Park and provide
TWO reasons for recommending it based on its characteristics.

_extraction.note: 자동 추출 초안. passage/meta/answer 모두 수동 보완 필요.
